mapper.sql: p.id, p.nickname, p.breed, p.gender, p.birthday, p.weight, p.vaccine_status AS vaccineStatus, p.allergy_history AS allergyHistory, p.image, p.customer_id AS customerId, p.create_time AS createTime, p.update_time AS updateTime
mapper.insert: insert into pet (nickname, breed, gender, birthday, weight, vaccine_status, allergy_history, image, customer_id) values (#{nickname}, #{breed}, #{gender}, #{birthday}, #{weight}, #{vaccineStatus}, #{allergyHistory}, #{image}, #{customerId})
mapper.update: update pet set nickname = #{nickname}, breed = #{breed}, gender = #{gender}, birthday = #{birthday}, weight = #{weight}, vaccine_status = #{vaccineStatus}, allergy_history = #{allergyHistory}, image = #{image}, customer_id = #{customerId} where id = #{id}
